name: TransactionFact
description: Canonical immutable account movement without embedded provenance, reconciliation, category, pool, or payment attribution.
schema_def: transaction_fact: id ULID primary key; accountId required RESTRICT; signedAmountMinor Int64 non-zero owner-economic-position delta; currencyCode literal ZAR; transactionDate required LocalDate; postingDate optional LocalDate; effectiveDate derived from transactionDate; originalDescription owner-safe text; recordedAt trusted UTC instant; recordedByOsIdentity protected metadata. Constraints: insert-only; finance facts do not contain sourceReference, provenanceKind, evidence, category, pool, instrument, cardholder, or relationship columns; initial evidence is stored atomically in EvidenceRecord and EvidenceLink.
